title: クラスメイトとバクシン！

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm out with Sakura Bakushin O during one of our
days off, but she seems to be distracted by
something.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: ...One of my classmates is leaving the academy.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I'm really going to miss her, both as class
representative and as a friend...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One characteristic of the academy is that
students frequently come and go. Despite that, it
still isn't easy to part ways.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Wait? Is that...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A student wearing a tracksuit runs right past us.
She appears to heading toward the academy.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
That's the classmate I was just talking about! She
shouldn't be training at this time of night...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I can't allow it as a class representative! Stop right
there!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
It's already late, so you had better head back. I
can't overlook someone breaking curfew!

text_block_list.name: Freckled Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I know I'm breaking the rules. But I don't have
much more time!

text_block_list.name: Freckled Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
I'm leaving the academy because my father is
being transferred overseas for work...

text_block_list.name: Freckled Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
So, for my final race—well, final scrimmage—I
want to practice as hard as I can so I don't leave
with any regrets.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Your final race...

text_block_list.name: Freckled Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
I didn't have much talent and didn't even have a
trainer... But I want to go out on a race I feel
satisfied with!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I see. I understand how you feel. And I've made
up my mind!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
From this moment forward, I—as class
representative—will assist with your training!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Is that all right, Trainer?
choice_data_list: Sure, but not today. It's past curfew!
Sure, but not today. It's past curfew!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Oh, that's right! Your training begins tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
With my help and my trainer's guidance, you'll
definitely take first place!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, I help Sakura Bakushin O train her
classmate.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her classmate informs me that she's racing in a
long-distance scrimmage, which is Sakura
Bakushin O's greatest weakness.
choice_data_list: What are you going to do?
What are you going to do?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
All I can do is give it the ol' Bakushin try!
Bakushin will light the way!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She gives the answer I expected. The answer I
feared. And so...
choice_data_list:
Bakushin full speed ahead, but watch your
stamina!

You need to consider your timing when you
Bakushin.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I explain how endurance and stamina are essential
for completing the track and succeeding in a
long-distance race.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I see! It's definitely impossible to Bakushin if you
lack the energy to do so!
choice_data_list: So let's focus on training your energy retention.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I understand! Let's see it through to the end!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... Whew... Okay! That's... enough for today!

text_block_list.name: Freckled Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Thanks, Baku! You too, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Freckled Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
I really feel like I got somewhere in today's
training. I'll definitely make sure to leave a good
final impression!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: That's... all... that matters...

text_block_list.name: Freckled Umamusume
text_block_list.text: B-Baku?! Did... Did she fall asleep?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Being that she's a sprinter, the long-distance
training has clearly taken its toll.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, she pushed herself beyond her limits to
help train her classmate.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Snore... I was merely... doing my job. Yawn...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I watch her sleep, I notice a small smile of
satisfaction on her face.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I explain how a dash of speed at a critical
moment could help her fly up into the lead.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I see! So my Bakushin is like a secret finisher!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
One needs to wait and find the right timing to
Bakushin!

text_block_list.name: Freckled Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Okay, I got it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To train her, I first need to understand the
abilities and running tendencies of Sakura
Bakushin O's classmate.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I devise a training schedule tailored to what we're
dealing with and have both of them participate.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Okay, let's finish for today!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I think you've really nailed the perfect timing to
Bakushin thanks to this training!

text_block_list.name: Freckled Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Thanks to that, I really feel like I got a
hang of it! I'll definitely deliver results!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I'm expecting a great show! Bakushin will solve
everything!

text_block_list.name: Freckled Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Hehe! Thanks! You always help me out, Baku.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Naturally! I am the class representative after all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems that being appreciated by a fellow
classmate helps to raise Sakura Bakushin O's
confidence.
